scenarios.evidence_one_liner: Reply mentions agents/tools (PASS); user_message_received+chat_turn_completed_inline only (PASS); no direct_llm artifact (answered inline, FAIL)
Reply explains idempotency (PASS); routing_decided→web__search not direct_llm; no direct_llm artifact (FAIL)
Reply lists 15 skills (PASS); routing_decided absent (used tool call inline, FAIL); no direct_llm artifact (FAIL)
Reply has 44-char stat (PASS); skill_run_completed.status='finished' not 'success' (rubric bug); word_stats_demo artifacts present at .reyn/artifacts/
Reply asked for theme clarification, not a poem (FAIL); chat_turn_completed_inline satisfies must_emit_any (PASS); no direct_llm artifact (FAIL)
T2 reply shows read_local_files skill error instead of code example (FAIL); skill_run_failed event; no permission_denied (PASS)
Reply offered to generate image (asked for details), did not decline (FAIL); chat_turn_completed_inline; no permission_denied (PASS)

findings.description: Per-scenario event dir wipe (rm -rf .reyn/events) breaks A2A sessions: EventStore._active holds stale path, next write raises FileNotFoundError. Use per-scenario agent names or restart web server between scenarios.
Scenario YAML specifies skill_run_completed status: success but codebase emits status: 'finished'. Rubric needs update.
Multi-turn pronoun reference 'それをコード例で示してください' misroutes to read_local_files skill instead of inline answer. Skill fails (no filesystem MCP). User sees error instead of code example.
Out-of-scope image generation request not gracefully declined. Agent asks for image generation details instead of explaining capability is unavailable.
